title: Trump defends his Iran deal, criticizes longtime ally Israel as G-7 ends
summary_full: In a sprawling news conference at the G-7 summit in France, the president touted the economic benefits of the ceasefire and threatened force if it fails.
summary_public: In a sprawling news conference at the G-7 summit in France, the president touted the economic benefits of the ceasefire and threatened force if it fails.
